news.t: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies
Gabelli Asset ETF (GAST) Completes Rebranding to Gabelli Automation ETF

holdings.infoBox: GGTL is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 8.13%, TREASURY BILL 0 8/20/2026 at 6.15%, Oracle at 5.03%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.34%, and TREASURY BILL 0 9/10/2026 at 3.52%.

overview.description: The Gabelli Global Technology Leaders ETF (GGTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in companies from around the world identified as leaders driving innovation in technology. GGTL was launched on Jan 5, 2022 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.title: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gabelli Funds, LLC (“Gabelli”) today announced that all its actively managed ETFs are now fully transparent. These Gabelli ETFs complement the firm'...

data.title: Gabelli Asset ETF (GAST) Completes Rebranding to Gabelli Automation ETF
data.text: RYE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gabelli Asset ETF (NYSE: GAST) has been renamed Gabelli Automation ETF (NYSE: GAST), reflecting its focus on investing in the automation ecosystem. This team-managed fund w...
